description_long: This is a robust, rectangular metal safe box with a slightly rounded edge design and a matte, pale gray finish. The front features a heavy-duty door equipped with a prominent horizontal handle, a circular rotating locking mechanism, and a keyhole, all made of metallic material. Above the locking mechanism, there is an oval-shaped metallic label plate, likely indicating the brand or manufacturer. The door is mounted on two visible external hinges on the right side, allowing it to swing open. The sides and back of the safe are plain, with subtle surface wear and no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests a secure, industrial-grade safe suitable for storing valuables in urban environments such as offices, garages, or small businesses.
description: A sturdy, pale gray metal safe box with a front door featuring a handle, rotating lock, keyhole, and a metallic label plate. The design is industrial and secure, with external right-side hinges and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the door with a metallic handle, rotating lock, keyhole, and an oval label plate, as well as two external hinges on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with the door handle slightly visible near the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, smooth back panel with subtle vertical seam lines.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain surface and the door handle and hinges partially visible at the front edge.
attribute_handle_design: horizontal fixed bar handle, metallic, mounted on the left side of the door
attribute_door_hinge_placement: right side external hinges, two vertically aligned
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: oval metallic label plate above the lock, engraved or embossed, no readable text visible
